briefdescription.para: true when nsoil, nsurftype and nsoiltype are provided at initialization

detaileddescription.para: Sets up the core framework and initializes the error manager. Components are initialized later during configuration.

memberdef.argsstring: (this, config_file, nx, ny, nz, nsoil, nsoiltype, nsurftype, rc)
memberdef.name: configure

briefdescription.para: Configure the CATChem core with a configuration file.

detaileddescription.para: Loads configuration and initializes all components in the correct order.

briefdescription.para: Finalize and clean up the core.
Add a process to the process manager.
Check if core is ready for operations.
Central CATChem core that owns all major components.

detaileddescription.para: This type serves as the single entry point and owner of all major CATChem components. It manages their lifecycles and provides controlled access between components to avoid circular dependencies.
